scripts.bundle:live: npm run bundle:runtime && npm run bundle:worker
scripts.bundle:editor: esbuild src/browser-entry.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --outfile=../editor/vendor/limina-runtime.js --loader:.ts=ts && esbuild src/browser/sim-worker-entry.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --outfile=../editor/vendor/sim-worker-entry.js --loader:.ts=ts && esbuild src/editor/history_controller.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --outfile=../editor/vendor/history-controller.js --loader:.ts=ts && esbuild src/eyes/render_harness_entry.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --outfile=../editor/vendor/render-harness.js --loader:.ts=ts && esbuild src/eyes/self_correct.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --outfile=../editor/vendor/self_correct.mjs --loader:.ts=ts
scripts.export:demo: cd .. && ./target/release/limina js/scripts/export-demo.ts && mkdir -p web/public/worlds/demo && cp -f traces/demo.manifest.json web/public/worlds/demo/manifest.json && cp -f traces/demo.log.jsonl web/public/worlds/demo/log.jsonl && cp -f traces/demo.keyframes.jsonl web/public/worlds/demo/keyframes.jsonl
